inputs.label: Number of Campers
inputs.businessContext: Total number of people on the camping trip

inputs.label: Number of Nights
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the camping trip in nights

inputs.label: Daily Water per Person
inputs.businessContext: Recommended water per person per day for drinking, cooking, and hygiene

inputs.label: Daily Food Energy per Person
inputs.businessContext: Average daily calorie intake per person

inputs.label: Firewood per Night
inputs.businessContext: Estimated firewood needed per evening campfire

inputs.label: Temperature Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjust water needs: 0 for normal, positive for hot (e.g., 0.2 for >30°C), negative for cold

inputs.label: Safety Margin
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra supplies for unforeseen circumstances
